title: DN32 8HP, Young’s Seafood Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/BQ1972IR/V007
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Young’s Seafood Limited Installation name: Humberstone Road Fish Processing Permit number: EPR/BQ1972IR/V007  "
